name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Tacoma, WA: Superb Cash Advance at 5524 E McKinley Ave offers fast payday and title loans with convenient extended hours seven days a week.
description_long:
Located at 5524 E McKinley Ave in Tacoma, WA, Superb Cash Advance is a standalone storefront serving the East Tacoma community. This convenient location operates extended hours to accommodate working residents: Monday through Friday 8:30 AM–8:30 PM, and Saturday–Sunday 9:30 AM–6:30 PM, making it accessible whether you need a loan during the week or on weekends.

At this Tacoma location, Superb Cash Advance provides fast payday loans and title loans with straightforward application processes and same-day approval options. Whether you need quick cash for an unexpected expense or short-term financing against your vehicle title, the team at this WA storefront can help. Reach them at 253-364-7737 to discuss your borrowing needs and get answers about terms and eligibility.

If you're a Tacoma resident facing an urgent financial gap, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information to expedite the application process. Superb Cash Advance serves as a local resource when traditional banks are too slow or credit requirements too strict. This East McKinley Ave location has built its reputation on fast, straightforward service for Tacoma's diverse community.
pros: Same-day loan approval and funding reported by multiple customers
Accepts all credit types with no hard credit check requirement
Flexible, personalized payment schedules designed around individual budgets
Minimal documentation requirements for loan applications
Convenient physical location in Atlanta with extended hours (8:30am-8:30pm weekdays)
Wide loan amount range from $250 up to $50,000 depending on product type
Consistently positive customer reviews highlighting staff friendliness and professionalism
cons: No interest rates, APR, or fee information disclosed on website
Heavy website content duplication and unclear product differentiation make terms hard to verify
Customer reviews reference non-existent Arvada location, suggesting data quality issues
Emergency cash advance products typically carry very high interest rates not disclosed here
No transparent pricing or comparison tools to evaluate actual cost of borrowing
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing immediate cash
Individuals seeking same-day or next-day loan funding without extensive documentation
Borrowers with flexible repayment ability seeking personalized payment arrangement options
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is designed for consumers with poor credit or no credit history who need emergency cash within 24 hours and cannot access traditional bank loans. The primary caveat is the absence of disclosed interest rates and terms—borrowers must visit in person or call (404) 994-3414 to learn actual costs, and these are typically high-interest products suitable only for genuine short-term emergencies, not ongoing borrowing.
services: In-person loan applications at Atlanta location
meta_description: Tacoma, WA: Superb Cash Advance at 5524 E McKinley Ave offers fast payday and title loans with convenient extended hours.
